title: Marbella Catamaran Charter Weddings: Costs, Seasons and Tips for 2026
html:
Marbella offers some of the Costa del Sol's most romantic backdrops for a wedding at sea, with catamaran charters departing from Puerto Banús. A half-day crewed catamaran typically costs from €2,500, and BoatHire24 makes it easy to compare options. For a seamless celebration on the Mediterranean, you can hire a boat that suits your guest list and style.

How much does it cost to charter a catamaran for a wedding in Marbella?

A full-day crewed catamaran charter for a wedding party of 12 guests typically starts at €3,500. Costs vary by season and included services. A shared sunset tour on a catamaran costs from €95 per person, while a private half-day charter for 20 guests begins around €2,000. For large groups, a premium catamaran like a Lagoon 50 can exceed €5,000 for a full day. You can hire a boat in a few minutes.

Where to set off in Marbella

The primary departure points for wedding charters are Puerto Banús, Marbella's glamorous superyacht marina, and the historic Puerto Deportivo de Marbella. From there, popular cruising grounds include the Cabo Pino marina eastwards, the sandy beach of Playa de la Fontanilla, and the bay of Marbella itself. For longer excursions, boats often head to the exclusive beach clubs at Nikki Beach or the scenic cliffs of Calahonda. Further along the coast, the fishing port of Fuengirola and the protected Cabo de Gata offer alternative anchorages. One option worth a look is the Fairline Targa 43 for hire.

Which boat to rent for your wedding

  1. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 42), best for stability, spacious decks, and hosting up to 12 guests; from €3,500 full day.
  2. Motor yacht (e.g. Fairline Targa 43), ideal for a stylish, smaller ceremony with up to 10 guests; from €2,000 half-day.
  3. Sailing yacht (e.g. Sun Odyssey), perfect for intimate elopements with 6, 8 guests; from €1,500 half-day.
  4. Luxury catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 620), suits large parties up to 20 guests with full crew, from €6,000 full day.

If you prefer a motor yacht for the wedding party, consider the Fairline Targa 43 for hire; its sleek design and modern amenities make it a popular choice for celebrations. If you own a boat, you can rent out your boat and earn from spare days.

When to book and what about licences?

The high season for Marbella wedding charters runs from June to September, when the Levante wind can create choppy afternoons. BoatHire24 recommends booking at least three months in advance for a June or July wedding. Regarding licences, if you opt for a fully crewed charter you do not need a licence. Bareboat rentals require a valid RYA Day Skipper or equivalent, and the operator confirms exact requirements before booking. BoatHire24 explains how boat rental works in detail on its platform, including licence checks and cancellation policies. To see how booking works, visit how boat rental works.

For a smoother ceremony, schedule your nuptials in the morning when the Mediterranean is often calmer before the westerly sea breeze builds.

At a glance

  • Price range: from €95 per person to €6,000 full-day private charter
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 4-hour half-day or 8-hour full-day
  • Max guest capacity: 12 (typical catamaran) up to 20 (luxury catamaran)
  • Currency: EUR
  • Booking platform: BoatHire24

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I get married on a catamaran in Marbella?

Yes, many charter operators offer wedding packages including captain officiants, decorations, and catering, though civil ceremonies require prior local paperwork.

What is included in a catamaran wedding charter?

Typically the crew, fuel, basic bar, and insurance are included; gourmet catering and photography are often add-ons at extra cost.

Do I need to book in advance for a summer wedding?

Absolutely, as June to September is the busiest period and popular catamarans are often reserved weeks ahead.

Can the boat stay in one spot for the ceremony?

Most crews will anchor in a sheltered bay such as the Marbella bay area or off Cabo Pino for a stationary ceremony.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own. Planning a wedding on the water is simpler when you compare listings, check availability, and read verified reviews. If you own a catamaran or yacht, consider earning extra income by listing it on the platform, you can rent out your boat through BoatHire24's owner portal.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
